steps.label: discord-message
steps.command: dc ci-dn-m '{"appName":"Niche Datasets Free","appEmoji":"🆓","body":"📝 Push received — Discord-notify-only pipeline (no build/test).","commitMessage":"$COMMIT_MESSAGE","branchName":"$GITHUB_REF_NAME","author":"$GITHUB_ACTOR","runNumber":"$GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER","runId":"$GITHUB_RUN_ID","repository":"$GITHUB_REPOSITORY","eventName":"$GITHUB_EVENT_NAME","eventDateTime":"$EVENT_DATETIME"}'
